title: Trend Micro security advisory (AV26-494)
description: On May 21, 2026, Trend Micro published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Apex One (on-premise)  server/agent builds prior to 2019 (on-prem) build 17079
Apex One as a service  SaaS
Trend Vision One Endpoint - SEP  agent builds prior to 14.0.20731
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
